UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Federal National Mortgage Association is present. Appearance counsel represents that he has settlement authority. No representative present.
Attorney Thomas Hesketh appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Larry Lapuyade is present.
Attorney Ian Boisvert representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of OCT-29-2012 is vacated.
